sql.mssql: CREATE TABLE BPQMNC_FASE ( IDFASE BIGINT NOT NULL, DESCFASE VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, ATIVO CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'S' NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT PK_BPQM_NC_FASE PRIMARY KEY (IDFASE), CONSTRAINT CK_BPQM_NC_FASE_AT CHECK (ATIVO IN ('S','N')) );

sql.oracle: CREATE TABLE BPQMNC_REGISTRO ( IDNC NUMBER(10,0) NOT NULL, NUMNC VARCHAR2(20) NOT NULL, STATUS CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'A' NOT NULL, IDFASE NUMBER(10,0) DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL, ORIGEM CHAR(2) NOT NULL, IDPRIORIDADE NUMBER(10,0) NOT NULL, TIPONC VARCHAR2(2) NOT NULL, CODPARC NUMBER(10,0), NUNOTA NUMBER(10,0), PROCESSO VARCHAR2(100), DTREGISTRO DATE DEFAULT SYSDATE NOT NULL, DTPREVENCERRAR DATE, DTENCERRAMENTO DATE, DETALHAMENTO CLOB NOT NULL, REINCIDENTE CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'N' NOT NULL, NAOPROCEDENTE CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'N' NOT NULL, NCVINCULADA NUMBER(10,0), CODUSU NUMBER(38,0) NOT NULL, DTCRIACAO DATE DEFAULT SYSDATE NOT NULL, DTALTER DATE, CODUSU_ALTER NUMBER(38,0), CONSTRAINT PK_BPQM_NC_REGISTRO PRIMARY KEY (IDNC), CONSTRAINT UQ_BPQM_NC_REGISTRO_NUM UNIQUE (NUMNC), CONSTRAINT CK_BPQM_NC_REG_STATUS CHECK (STATUS IN ('A','P','E','C','X')), CONSTRAINT CK_BPQM_NC_REG_ORIGEM CHECK (ORIGEM IN ('C','F','I','A','O')), CONSTRAINT CK_BPQM_NC_REG_TIPO CHECK (TIPONC IN ('P','S','PR','SG')), CONSTRAINT CK_BPQM_NC_REG_REINC CHECK (REINCIDENTE IN ('S','N')), CONSTRAINT CK_BPQM_NC_REG_NAOPROC CHECK (NAOPROCEDENTE IN ('S','N')) ); COMMENT ON TABLE BPQMNC_REGISTRO IS 'QualityManager: registro principal de Nao Conformidade — ISO 9001 §8.7 + §10.2'; COMMENT ON COLUMN BPQMNC_REGISTRO.NUMNC IS 'Numero legivel gerado automaticamente: NC-YYYY-NNNN'; COMMENT ON COLUMN BPQMNC_REGISTRO.STATUS IS 'A=Aberta, P=Em andamento, E=Encerrada, C=Cancelada, X=Nao procedente'; COMMENT ON COLUMN BPQMNC_REGISTRO.IDFASE IS 'FK -> BPQMNC_FASE.IDFASE. Fase atual do workflow (1 a 10)'; COMMENT ON COLUMN BPQMNC_REGISTRO.ORIGEM IS 'C=Cliente, F=Fornecedor, I=Interno, A=Auditoria, O=Outro'; COMMENT ON COLUMN BPQMNC_REGISTRO.TIPONC IS 'P=Produto, S=Servico, PR=Processo, SG=Sistema de Gestao'; COMMENT ON COLUMN BPQMNC_REGISTRO.CODPARC IS 'FK opcional -> TGFPAR.CODPARC'; COMMENT ON COLUMN BPQMNC_REGISTRO.NUNOTA IS 'FK opcional -> TGFCAB.NUNOTA';
sql.mssql: CREATE TABLE BPQMNC_REGISTRO ( IDNC BIGINT NOT NULL, NUMNC VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, STATUS CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'A' NOT NULL, IDFASE BIGINT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL, ORIGEM CHAR(2) NOT NULL, IDPRIORIDADE BIGINT NOT NULL, TIPONC VARCHAR(2) NOT NULL, CODPARC INT, NUNOTA BIGINT, PROCESSO VARCHAR(100), DTREGISTRO DATETIME DEFAULT GETDATE() NOT NULL, DTPREVENCERRAR DATETIME, DTENCERRAMENTO DATETIME, DETALHAMENTO VARCHAR(MAX) NOT NULL, REINCIDENTE CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'N' NOT NULL, NAOPROCEDENTE CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'N' NOT NULL, NCVINCULADA BIGINT, CODUSU INT NOT NULL, DTCRIACAO DATETIME DEFAULT GETDATE() NOT NULL, DTALTER DATETIME, CODUSU_ALTER INT, CONSTRAINT PK_BPQM_NC_REGISTRO PRIMARY KEY (IDNC), CONSTRAINT UQ_BPQM_NC_REGISTRO_NUM UNIQUE (NUMNC), CONSTRAINT CK_BPQM_NC_REG_STATUS CHECK (STATUS IN ('A','P','E','C','X')), CONSTRAINT CK_BPQM_NC_REG_ORIGEM CHECK (ORIGEM IN ('C','F','I','A','O')), CONSTRAINT CK_BPQM_NC_REG_TIPO CHECK (TIPONC IN ('P','S','PR','SG')), CONSTRAINT CK_BPQM_NC_REG_REINC CHECK (REINCIDENTE IN ('S','N')), CONSTRAINT CK_BPQM_NC_REG_NAOPROC CHECK (NAOPROCEDENTE IN ('S','N')) );

sql.oracle: CREATE SEQUENCE SEQ_BPQM_NC_REGISTRO START WITH 1 INCREMENT BY 1 NOCACHE NOCYCLE;
sql.mssql: CREATE SEQUENCE SEQ_BPQM_NC_REGISTRO START WITH 1 INCREMENT BY 1;

CREATE TRIGGER TRG_BPQM_NC_REGISTRO_BI ON BPQMNC_REGISTRO INSTEAD OF INSERT AS BEGIN DECLARE @IDNC BIGINT; SELECT @IDNC = NEXT VALUE FOR SEQ_BPQM_NC_REGISTRO; INSERT INTO BPQMNC_REGISTRO ( IDNC, NUMNC, STATUS, IDFASE, ORIGEM, IDPRIORIDADE, TIPONC, CODPARC, NUNOTA, PROCESSO, DTREGISTRO, DTPREVENCERRAR, DETALHAMENTO, REINCIDENTE, NAOPROCEDENTE, NCVINCULADA, CODUSU, DTCRIACAO ) SELECT @IDNC, 'NC-' + CAST(YEAR(GETDATE()) AS VARCHAR(4)) + '-' + RIGHT('0000' + CAST(@IDNC AS VARCHAR(4)), 4), 'A', 1, ORIGEM, IDPRIORIDADE, TIPONC, CODPARC, NUNOTA, PROCESSO, ISNULL(DTREGISTRO, GETDATE()), DTPREVENCERRAR, DETALHAMENTO, ISNULL(REINCIDENTE, 'N'), ISNULL(NAOPROCEDENTE, 'N'), NCVINCULADA, CODUSU, GETDATE() FROM INSERTED; END;

CREATE TABLE BPQMNC_REG_FASES ( IDREGFASE BIGINT NOT NULL, IDNC BIGINT NOT NULL, IDFASE BIGINT NOT NULL, DTFASE DATETIME DEFAULT GETDATE() NOT NULL, CODUSU INT NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT PK_BPQM_NC_REG_FASES PRIMARY KEY (IDREGFASE) );

sql.oracle: CREATE SEQUENCE SEQ_BPQM_NC_REG_FASES START WITH 1 INCREMENT BY 1 NOCACHE NOCYCLE;
sql.mssql: CREATE SEQUENCE SEQ_BPQM_NC_REG_FASES START WITH 1 INCREMENT BY 1;
